sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27803" key="dmw/|ios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δμῴ-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n27803.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in servile condition,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βρέφος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.407</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.
